action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 16 spent 40 minutes on a local parameter search that yielded useless results because the DirectionalPlanner code in predict.py was truncated/incomplete. The best-ever evaluation score remains 0.6118 from iteration 7 (or possibly iteration 6's improved greedy). The current predict.py is corrupted. We have ~1.5 hours and 14 iterations left. Analysis: I need a completely clean, bug-free rewrite of predict.py implementing a proven simple global greedy heuristic. The iteration-2 baseline (global Dijkstra, utility/(dist+1.0), first-step tracing) scored 0.6013 reliably. I will recreate this, add only light anti-backtracking and a frontier fallback to boost room success, and immediately submit evaluation. No more unvalidated local searches. Decision: Overwrite predict.py, train.py, and smoke_test.py with clean, complete code. Run train.py + smoke_test.py, then submit eval to measure score on the full dataset.
